suggested_actions.label: Review detected people groups
suggested_actions.reason: Open each group, confirm the name, and reject faces that belong to another person.

suggested_actions.label: Apply reviewed people to catalog
suggested_actions.reason: Enabled when at least one group is ready and the report contains face encodings.

suggested_actions.label: Rerun scan with encodings
suggested_actions.reason: review-apply needs a report produced with --include-encodings.

suggested_actions.label: Rerun scan after applying catalog changes
suggested_actions.reason: Verify that named-person matching improves after catalog training.

ui_contract.group_list: Render groups as a sidebar/list ordered by review status and group size.
ui_contract.face_cards: Render each face as a local image card with crop box metadata and include/reject controls.
ui_contract.persistence: Save reviewer decisions back to the workflow JSON, then call people review-apply.

privacy_notice: This workspace can reveal who appears in which local files. If encodings are included, the JSON contains sensitive biometric metadata and should stay local/private.
